name: 轻羽云盘
description: 轻羽云盘 - 一个功能全面、安全可靠的云存储系统

scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && mvn spring-boot:run" "cd frontend && npm run serve"
scripts.build: cd backend && mvn clean package && cd ../frontend && npm run build
scripts.install-deps: cd backend && mvn dependency:resolve && cd ../frontend && npm install
